title: Tomato Soup
instructions: Place the 2 heads of garlic on the tray, with the tops cut off.
Put some basil stems on the tray.
Cover with a little bit of balsamic vinegar.
Roast in the oven at 200°C for 40 minutes or until roasted.
Put the roasted vegetables into a blender, doing this in sections if your blender isn't big enough.
Blend into a nice thick soup.
Transfer to a pot on the stove over medium heat, wait until hot, and simmer with 300ml thickened cream.
Stir in a little bit of parmesan.
